allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/reply -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"content": "Bonjour, vous etes disponible demain ?", "tone": "wolf-inc"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/reply -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"content": "Bonjour, vous etes disponible demain ?", "tone": "wolf-inc"}' --max-time 60)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/reply -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"content": "Vous etes disponible demain pour un appel ?", "tone": "__TRACKED_VAR__"}' --max-time 60)
